hero.name: Cesar Huesca
hero.description-1: Full-stack web developer. Focused on creating modern, efficient, and scalable web applications
hero.description-2: Motivated to learn constantly, face new challenges, and participate in projects where software has a real impact

job-1.title: Web Developer
job-1.description: Web developer on the Genius project in the Space/Defense division at Indra. I work with Angular and TypeScript for front-end development, using libraries such as PrimeNG, DHTMLX, and Leaflet.js. I also contribute to back-end development tasks with .NET, Redis, and PostgreSQL, and coordinate teams tools like Git and Jira

project-1.name: Impostor Game
project-1.description: A viral multiplayer social media game where each player receives a secret word except for one—the impostor. Through clues, deception, and deduction, the players must discover the impostor before the impostor guesses the real word

project-2.name: Restaurant manager
project-2.description: Intuitive platform to manage restaurants from one place: tables, orders, inventory and staff in a simple and efficient way

contact.description: Currently available for new projects and collaborations. If you need my services, I'd be happy to help.
